title: Orders analytical overview
content: Orders stores the commercial transactions. Use OrderDate for temporal filters, CustomerID to link to customers, EmployeeID to link to employees, and ShipVia to link to shippers.

title: Order details revenue metrics
content: Order Details stores line items. Join Orders by OrderID and Products by ProductID. Revenue can be derived from UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount).

title: Products and categories catalog
content: Products links to Categories by CategoryID and Suppliers by SupplierID. Useful for pricing, inventory, and category-level summaries.
